fixes.title: Confidence accepts strings instead of numbers
changes: Added custom validator to reject string values (typeof check)
Applied to both validateCreateEntry and validateUpdateEntry

fixes.title: Soft-deleted entries return 404
changes: Both endpoints only filter deleted_at IS NULL by default
Count query also respects includeDeleted flag

fixes.title: No pagination limit max
changes: If limit > 1000, return 400 error with message

fixes.title: Full-text search misses some matches
test_cases: Search for words with different stemming should now match
Special characters and partial matches may work better

notes: All fixes are straightforward and low-risk. The confidence validation now properly rejects string values while maintaining the 0-100 range check. The includeDeleted parameter allows admin/recovery use cases. Pagination limits prevent abuse while allowing reasonable page sizes. Full-text search using 'simple' instead of 'english' should match more results without stemming rules.
